chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Ist. Appeal No.D- 18 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on CMA-1822 of 2019. 2. For orders on office objection No.16 and the reply of the Advocate of appellant. 3. For orders on CMA-2011 of 2019. 4. For hearing of main case. 04.08.2020 None present. = This Ist. Appeal is called for hearing. Despite notice to the counsel for the appellant for today, none present on their behalf nor any intimation received. Instant appeal was filed on 23.04.2019. Since filing of this first appeal neither appellant nor their counsel is pursuing the same vigilantly. Accordingly, the instant first appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending applications. Office is directed to send a copy of this order immediately to the trial Court for information. JUDGE JUDGE S
